requirements.title: Download mobile application
actions: A user should be able to download the mobile application through either an application store or similar service on the mobile phone.
The application should be free to download.
requirements.description: A user should be able to download the mobile application through either an application store or similar service on the mobile phone. The application should be free to download.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to download the mobile application.

requirements.title: Download and notify users of new releases
actions: When a new/updated version or release of the software is released, the user should check for these manually.
The download of the new release should be done through the mobile phone in the same way as downloading the mobile application.
requirements.description: When a new/updated version or release of the software is released, the user should check for these manually. The download of the new release should be done through the mobile phone in the same way as downloading the mobile application.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to download a new/updated release.

requirements.title: User registration - Mobile application
actions: Given that a user has downloaded the mobile application, then the user should be able to register through the mobile application.
The user must provide user-name, password and e-mail address.
The user can choose to provide a regularly used phone number.
requirements.description: Given that a user has downloaded the mobile application, then the user should be able to register through the mobile application. The user must provide user-name, password and e-mail address. The user can choose to provide a regularly used phone number.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to register on the mobile application.

requirements.title: User log-in - Mobile application
actions: Given that a user has registered, then the user should be able to log in to the mobile application.
The log-in information will be stored on the phone and in the future the user should be logged in automatically.
requirements.description: Given that a user has registered, then the user should be able to log in to the mobile application. The log-in information will be stored on the phone and in the future the user should be logged in automatically.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to register on the mobile application.

requirements.title: Retrieve password
actions: Given that a user has registered, then the user should be able to retrieve his/her password by e- mail.
requirements.description: Given that a user has registered, then the user should be able to retrieve his/her password by e- mail.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to retrieve his/her password.

requirements.title: Mobile application - Search
actions: Given that a user is logged in to the mobile application, then the first page that is shown should be the search page.
The user should be able to search for a restaurant, according to several search options.
There should also be a free- text search option.
A user should be able to select multiple search options in one search.
requirements.description: Given that a user is logged in to the mobile application, then the first page that is shown should be the search page. The user should be able to search for a restaurant, according to several search options. The search options are Price, Destination, Restaurant type and Specific dish. There should also be a free- text search option. A user should be able to select multiple search options in one search.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to search for a restaurant.

requirements.title: Mobile application - Search result in a map view
actions:  Search results can be viewed on a map.
 A specific pin will represent a specific restaurant location.
On each pin there should be an information link.
 There should be maximally 100 results displayed.
The map view should have a default zoom.
 The map view should include a button that, when selected, should display different filtering options in a filtering menu.
requirements.description:  Search results can be viewed on a map. On the map, the relevant and closest restaurants according to the user’s position are shown.  A specific pin will represent a specific restaurant location. On each pin there should be an information link.  There should be maximally 100 results displayed. The map view should have a default zoom.  The map view should include a button that, when selected, should display different filtering options in a filtering menu.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: The way results are displayed in a map.

requirements.title: Mobile application - Search result in a list view
actions:  Search results can be viewed in a list.

Each element should include the restaurant name, telephone number, type of food, distance according to the user’s position, average price, a short two-line description, a link to the restaurant’s web-page and an information link.
 There should be maximally 100 results displayed.
If the result contains more restaurants than what can be displayed on the screen at one time, the user should be able to scroll through them.
 When searching by price the restaurants should be sorted according to the following order: 1.
specific dish  When searching by a search option, other than price, the restaurants should be sorted according to the following order: 1.
specific dish  The list view should include a header with different selectable sorting options.
 The list view should include a button that, when selected, should display different filtering options in a filtering menu.
requirements.description:  Search results can be viewed in a list. Each element in the list represents a specific restaurant. Each element should include the restaurant name, telephone number, type of food, distance according to the user’s position, average price, a short two-line description, a link to the restaurant’s web-page and an information link.  There should be maximally 100 results displayed. If the result contains more restaurants than what can be displayed on the screen at one time, the user should be able to scroll through them.  When searching by price the restaurants should be sorted according to the following order: 1. average price 2. distance 3. restaurant type 4. specific dish  When searching by a search option, other than price, the restaurants should be sorted according to the following order: 1. distance 2. average price 3. restaurant type 4. specific dish  The list view should include a header with different selectable sorting options.  The list view should include a button that, when selected, should display different filtering options in a filtering menu.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: The way results should be displayed in a list.

requirements.title: Mobile application - Navigation to restaurant
actions: A user should be able to select a pin on a map or an element on a list.
When a selection is made, the location of the restaurant should be sent to the mobile phone’s GPS-navigation program.
The user should then be navigated to the destination.
When the destination is reached, a user should be able to go back to the search page on the mobile application.
requirements.description: A user should be able to select a pin on a map or an element on a list. When a selection is made, the location of the restaurant should be sent to the mobile phone’s GPS-navigation program. The user should then be navigated to the destination. When the destination is reached, a user should be able to go back to the search page on the mobile application.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: To navigate a user to a chosen restaurant.

requirements.title: Mobile application - Switch result view
actions: A user should be able to switch between a map view and a list view for all search options.
requirements.description: A user should be able to switch between a map view and a list view for all search options.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to switch between result views.

requirements.title: Mobile application - Selecting the information link
actions: A user should be able to select the information link, which is included on all result items.

The link will direct the user to an information page, which includes a picture of the restaurant, the restaurant name, address, phone number, e-mail address, type of food, average price, restaurant description and a menu with name, description and price of the different dishes.
requirements.description: A user should be able to select the information link, which is included on all result items. The link will direct the user to an information page, which includes a picture of the restaurant, the restaurant name, address, phone number, e-mail address, type of food, average price, restaurant description and a menu with name, description and price of the different dishes.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: In order to show information about the restaurants.

requirements.title: Mobile application - Search by price
actions: A user should be able to input a maximum and a minimum price range.
requirements.description: A user should be able to input a maximum and a minimum price range. The result is displayed in a list view by default.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to search by price.

requirements.title: Mobile application - Search by destination
actions: A user should be able to input a maximum and a minimum distance, according to his/her position.
The user should be able to input a higher or lower maximum distance and a higher minimum distance than set by default.
requirements.description: A user should be able to input a maximum and a minimum distance, according to his/her position. By default the minimum distance is set to 0 km and the maximum to 10 km. The user should be able to input a higher or lower maximum distance and a higher minimum distance than set by default. The result is displayed in a map view by default.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to search by destination.

requirements.title: Accepted input for price and destination search
actions: Integers should be accepted as input when a user searches by price or destination.
If the system receives an invalid input the user should be informed and prompted to insert an accepted input.
requirements.description: Integers should be accepted as input when a user searches by price or destination. If the system receives an invalid input the user should be informed and prompted to insert an accepted input.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to search with valid input.

requirements.title: Mobile application - Search by restaurant type
actions: A user should be able to select a restaurant type in a given list as input.
requirements.description: A user should be able to select a restaurant type in a given list as input. The result is displayed in a map view by default.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to search by restaurant type.

requirements.title: Mobile application - Search by specific dish
actions: A user should be able to select a specific dish in a given list as input.
requirements.description: A user should be able to select a specific dish in a given list as input. The result is displayed in a map view by default.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to search by specific dish.

requirements.title: Mobile application - Free-text search
actions: A user should be able to conduct a search by providing either restaurant name, restaurant description, restaurant address, restaurant type or restaurant menu in the free-text search field.
requirements.description: A user should be able to conduct a search by providing either restaurant name, restaurant description, restaurant address, restaurant type or restaurant menu in the free-text search field. The result is displayed in a map view by default.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to search through the free-text search.

requirements.title: Mobile application - No match found
actions: If no match is found the user should be informed but kept on the search page in order to get the possibility to conduct a new search right away.
requirements.description: If no match is found the user should be informed but kept on the search page in order to get the possibility to conduct a new search right away.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: In order for user to conduct a new search if no match is found.

requirements.title: Mobile application - Sorting results
actions: When viewing the results in a list, a user should be able to sort the results according to price, distance, restaurant type, specific dish or restaurant name.
 When sorting by restaurant name, specific dish or restaurant type the results should be ordered alphabetically.
 When sorting by price the results should be ordered from cheapest to most expensive.
 When sorting by distance the results should be ordered from closets to furthest distance according to the user’s position.
requirements.description: When viewing the results in a list, a user should be able to sort the results according to price, distance, restaurant type, specific dish or restaurant name.  When sorting by restaurant name, specific dish or restaurant type the results should be ordered alphabetically.  When sorting by price the results should be ordered from cheapest to most expensive.  When sorting by distance the results should be ordered from closets to furthest distance according to the user’s position.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to sort results in a list.

requirements.title: Mobile application - Filtering results
actions: When viewing the results in a list or a map, a user should be able to filter the results in a filtering menu.
requirements.description: When viewing the results in a list or a map, a user should be able to filter the results in a filtering menu. The filtering options include:  increasing or decreasing the maximum distance  increasing or decreasing the maximum price  choosing a restaurant type  choosing a specific dish
requirements.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to filter results in a list or a map.

requirements.title: Mobile application - Profile page
actions: On the mobile application, a user should have a profile page.
On the profile page a user can edit his/her information, which includes the password, e-mail address and phone number.
A user should also be able to choose what language the mobile application should be set to.
requirements.description: On the mobile application, a user should have a profile page. On the profile page a user can edit his/her information, which includes the password, e-mail address and phone number. A user should also be able to choose what language the mobile application should be set to. The different language choices are Swedish, English, Spanish and French.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to have a profile page on the mobile application.

requirements.title: Restaurant owner - Selecting preferred language on the web-portal
actions: selects English as a new language
selects Swedish as a new language
selects French as a new language
selects Spanish as a new language
requirements.description: A restaurant owner should be able to select a preferred language for the web-portal.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: A restaurant owner should be able to select a preferred language for the web-portal.

scenarios.name: Select English as preferred language
scenarios.given: the restaurant owner wants to select a preferred language
scenarios.when: the restaurant owner selects English as a new language
scenarios.then: the web-portal will show all text in English

scenarios.name: Select Swedish as preferred language
scenarios.given: the restaurant owner wants to select a preferred language
scenarios.when: the restaurant owner selects Swedish as a new language
scenarios.then: the web-portal will show all text in Swedish

scenarios.name: Select French as preferred language
scenarios.given: the restaurant owner wants to select a preferred language
scenarios.when: the restaurant owner selects French as a new language
scenarios.then: the web-portal will show all text in French

scenarios.name: Select Spanish as preferred language
scenarios.given: the restaurant owner wants to select a preferred language
scenarios.when: the restaurant owner selects Spanish as a new language
scenarios.then: the web-portal will show all text in Spanish

requirements.title: Administrator log in
actions: logs in
requirements.description: The requirement allows administrators to log into the web-portal.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: The requirement allows administrators to log into the web-portal.

scenarios.name: Successful log-in
scenarios.given: the administrator wants to log in
scenarios.when: the administrator logs in with an administrator account
scenarios.then: the administrator should be logged in as an administrator

requirements.title: Verify restaurant owner
actions: verifies
rejects
requirements.description: Allow an administrator to verify or reject a restaurant owner's access.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Allow an administrator to verify or reject a restaurant owner's access.

scenarios.name: Verify a restaurant owner
scenarios.when: the administrator verifies a restaurant owner
scenarios.then: the restaurant owner should be able to log in And the restaurant owner should be notified by a confirmation email

scenarios.name: Reject a restaurant owner
scenarios.when: the administrator rejects a restaurant owner
scenarios.then: the restaurant owner should not be able to log in And the restaurant owner should be notified by a rejection email

requirements.title: Manage restaurant types
actions: create
edit
delete
requirements.description: An administrator must be able to manage the list of restaurant types.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: An administrator must be able to manage the list of restaurant types.

scenarios.name: Add a new restaurant type
scenarios.when: the administrator creates a new restaurant type
scenarios.then: the new restaurant type should be added to the list of restaurant types

scenarios.name: Editing an existing restaurant type
scenarios.when: the administrator edits an existing restaurant type
scenarios.then: the restaurant type should be updated in the list of restaurant types

scenarios.name: Delete a restaurant type
scenarios.when: the administrator deletes a restaurant type
scenarios.then: the deleted restaurant type should be removed from the list of restaurant types

requirements.title: Manage restaurant dishes
actions: creates
edits
deletes
requirements.description: The administrator can manage the dishes in the system.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: The administrator can manage the dishes in the system.

scenarios.name: Add a new dish
scenarios.when: the administrator creates a new dish
scenarios.then: the new dish should be added to the list of dishes

scenarios.name: Editing an existing dish
scenarios.when: the administrator edits an existing dish
scenarios.then: the dish should be updated in the list of dishes

scenarios.name: Delete a dish
scenarios.when: the administrator deletes a dish
scenarios.then: the deleted dish should be removed from the list of dishes

requirements.title: Manage restaurant information
actions: adds
deletes
edits
requirements.description: An administrator can manage restaurant information via the web-portal.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: An administrator can manage restaurant information via the web-portal.

scenarios.name: Add restaurant information
scenarios.when: the administrator adds restaurant information
scenarios.then: the information should be added to the restaurant

scenarios.name: Delete restaurant information
scenarios.given: the administrator is logged in information about a restaurant exists
scenarios.when: the administrator deletes the information
scenarios.then: the information about the restaurant should be deleted

scenarios.name: Edit restaurant information
scenarios.given: the administrator is logged in information about a restaurant exists
scenarios.when: the administrator edits the information
scenarios.then: the information about the restaurant should be edited

requirements.title: Manage users
actions: edits an existing user
deletes an existing user
requirements.description: Allows administrators to manage user information.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Allows administrators to manage user information.

scenarios.name: Edit an existing user’s information
scenarios.when: the administrator edits an existing user
scenarios.then: the user information should be updated

scenarios.name: Delete/Inactivate an existing user
scenarios.when: the administrator deletes an existing user
scenarios.then: the user should be deleted

requirements.title: Manage restaurant owners
actions: manage
add
edit
delete
requirements.description: Allow an administrator to manage the restaurant owners.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Allow an administrator to manage the restaurant owners.

scenarios.name: Add a new restaurant owner
scenarios.when: the administrator creates a new restaurant owner
scenarios.then: the new restaurant owner should be added

scenarios.name: Edit an existing restaurant owner
scenarios.when: the administrator edits an existing restaurant owner
scenarios.then: the restaurant owner information should be updated

scenarios.name: Delete an existing restaurant owner
scenarios.when: the administrator deletes an existing restaurant owner
scenarios.then: the restaurant owner should be deleted And the restaurant information should be deleted

requirements.title: Administrator - Selecting preferred language on the web-portal
actions: selects English
selects Swedish
selects French
selects Spanish
requirements.description: An administrator should be able to select a preferred language for the web-portal.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: An administrator should be able to select a preferred language for the web-portal.

scenarios.name: Select English as preferred language
scenarios.given: the administrator wants to select a preferred language
scenarios.when: the administrator selects English as a new language
scenarios.then: the web-portal will show all text in English

scenarios.name: Select Swedish as preferred language
scenarios.given: the administrator wants to select a preferred language
scenarios.when: the administrator selects Swedish as a new language
scenarios.then: the web-portal will show all text in Swedish

scenarios.name: Select French as preferred language
scenarios.given: the administrator wants to select a preferred language
scenarios.when: the administrator selects French as a new language
scenarios.then: the web-portal will show all text in French

scenarios.name: Select Spanish as preferred language
scenarios.given: the administrator wants to select a preferred language
scenarios.when: the administrator selects Spanish as a new language
scenarios.then: the web-portal will show all text in Spanish

requirements.title: Prominent search feature
actions: The search feature should be prominent and easy to find for the user.
requirements.description: The search feature should be prominent and easy to find for the user.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: In order to for a user to find the search feature easily.

requirements.title: Usage of the search feature
actions: The different search options should be evident, simple and easy to understand.
requirements.description: The different search options should be evident, simple and easy to understand.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: In order to for a user to perform a search easily.

requirements.title: Usage of the result in the list view
actions: The results displayed in the list view should be user friendly and easy to understand.
Selecting an element in the result list should only take one click.
requirements.description: The results displayed in the list view should be user friendly and easy to understand. Selecting an element in the result list should only take one click.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: In order to for a user to use the list view easily.

requirements.title: Usage of the result in the map view
actions: The results displayed in the map view should be user friendly and easy to understand.
Selecting a pin on the map should only take one click.
requirements.description: The results displayed in the map view should be user friendly and easy to understand. Selecting a pin on the map should only take one click.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: In order to for a user to use the map view easily.

requirements.title: Usage of the information link
actions: The information link should be prominent and it should be evident that it is a usable link.
Selecting the information link should only take one click.
requirements.description: The information link should be prominent and it should be evident that it is a usable link. Selecting the information link should only take one click.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: In order to for a user to use the information link easily.

requirements.title: Response Time
requirements.description: The fastness of the search.
requirements.constraints: No more than 2 seconds 100% of the time.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Measurements obtained from 1000 searches during testing.
requirements.outputs: No more than 1 second 100% of the time.

requirements.title: System dependability
actions: informs user
requirements.description: The fault tolerance of the system.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: 100% of the time during 1000 hours of usage testing when the system loses connection to the Internet or GPS device or receives strange input, user should be informed

requirements.title: Hard drive space
requirements.description: The application's need of hard drive space.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: PLAN: No more than 15 MB. WISH: No more than 10 MB

requirements.title: Application memory usage
requirements.description: The amount of Operating System memory occupied by the application.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: PLAN: No more than 16 MB WISH: No more than 10 MB

requirements.title: SystemReliability
actions: The reliability of the system.
requirements.description: The reliability of the system.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Scale: The reliability that the system gives the right result on a search.; Meter: Measurements obtained from 1000 searches during testing.; Plan: More than 99% of the searches.

requirements.title: GPS Connection
actions: The application should be connected to the GPS device.
requirements.description: The application should be connected to the GPS device.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: In order for the application to get the users location, the map and to calculate the distance.

requirements.title: RestaurantOwnerCreateAccountSecurity
actions: The security of creating account for restaurant owners of the system.
requirements.description: The security of creating account for restaurant owners of the system.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Scale: If a restaurant owner wants to create an account and the desired user name is occupied, the restaurant owner should be asked to choose a different user name.; Meter: Measurements obtained on 1000 hours of usage during testing.

requirements.title: Application testability
actions: Test environments should be built for the application to allow testing of the applications different functions.
requirements.description: Test environments should be built for the application to allow testing of the applications different functions.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: In order to test the application.

requirements.title: Application portability
actions: The application should be portable with iOS and Android.
requirements.description: The application should be portable with iOS and Android.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: The adaptable platform for the application to run on.
